channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania's agriculture struggles with slow growth and low productivity
item.description: Tanzania's agricultural sector, which employs most of the country's workforce and ensures food security, continues to underperform despite decades of policy reforms and investments. Two main challenge...

item.title: Horse racing tips and previews for Canterbury races
item.description: The article provides detailed race-by-race previews and betting tips for the Canterbury horse racing meetings on Wednesday. It highlights key contenders in each race, analyzing their form, jockey clai...

item.title: Claire Kelly: A Legacy of Mid-Century Hollywood Elegance
item.description: Claire Kelly (1931–1998) was an American actress and model renowned for her striking beauty and poised presence in mid-20th century Hollywood. Born in 1931, she rose to prominence during the 1950s and...

item.title: KNEC Launches Online Portal for KCSE Certificate Downloads
item.description: The Kenya National Examinations Council (KNEC) has introduced an e-Certificate portal, allowing KCSE candidates to access, download, and verify their examination certificates online. This digital plat...

item.title: Child pedestrian fatalities rise in South Africa; RTMC urges improved road safety measures
item.description: A recent report reveals that children under the age of 14 account for 13.46% of road fatalities in South Africa, with Gauteng and KwaZulu-Natal recording the highest number of pedestrian deaths. Road ...

item.title: China and Philippines clash at disputed shoal, envoy summoned
item.description: China has summoned the Philippine ambassador to Beijing following a recent clash at the disputed Ren’ai Reef, a flashpoint in the ongoing territorial dispute between the two nations. The incident, whi...

item.title: Uddhav Sena challenges LS speaker's merger approval in Supreme Court
item.description: The Uddhav Sena, led by Uddhav Thackeray, has approached the Supreme Court to challenge Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla's decision to approve the merger of six rebel MPs with Eknath Shinde's faction. The f...

item.title: Saskatoon University Bridge Closure Extended Due to Construction Delays and Cost Increases
item.description: Saskatoon’s University Bridge remains closed to non-emergency vehicles as construction delays push back its reopening date. The city initially planned to reopen the bridge in June but delayed the time...

item.title: Lebanon's President Aoun Meets Trump to Push for Israeli Troop Withdrawal and Peace Talks
item.description: Lebanon’s President Joseph Aoun is set to meet with U.S. President Donald Trump in Washington to advance efforts for Israeli troop withdrawal from southern Lebanon. The meeting, part of Aoun’s four-da...

item.title: PM assures collaboration with GB government for region's development
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has assured Gilgit-Baltistan Chief Minister Amjad Hussain of the federal government's commitment to collaborative efforts for the region's welfare. During their meeting, ...

item.title: Residents protest after two women killed by security operatives in Plateau
item.description: Residents of Nayagota community in Gyel District, Jos South, staged a protest after two women were allegedly killed by security operatives. The incident, which happened early Monday, led to tension on...

item.title: Petrol Theft Crisis in the UK: Garage Owners Battle Rising Crime and Police Inaction
item.description: Fuel theft in the UK has surged by 23% since the start of the Iran war in February, with over £1.2m stolen weekly from forecourts. Shailesh Parekh, owner of six petrol stations in Birmingham, reports ...

item.title: Mild Sleep Deprivation Linked to Weight Gain in New Study
item.description: A recent study by Columbia University’s Vagelos School of Medicine reveals that even mild sleep deprivation—such as sleeping five to six hours per night—can contribute to weight gain and increase the ...

item.title: Kutlwano Monyai's Exhibition Celebrates Family Legacy Through Crocheting Art
item.description: Award-winning artist Kutlwano Monyai unveils her solo exhibition 'Dakalo: The Ultimate Gift', celebrating the cultural significance of crocheting through her family's legacy. The exhibition, held at G...

item.title: Lucy Hale mourns sudden passing of father Preston Hale
item.description: Lucy Hale, 37, has shared an emotional tribute to her late father, Preston Hale, on Instagram following his unexpected death. The Pretty Little Liars star revealed her father passed away suddenly last...

item.title: Eight workers killed in Sikkim tunnel collapse following landslide and suspected gas leak
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Namchi district of Sikkim on Monday when a landslide triggered the collapse of an under-construction tunnel, resulting in eight worker fatalities. The National Hydroelect...
